command.refreshStyles.title: Refresh Markdown Colors
command.openConfig.title: Open Style Config
configuration.title: Colorful Markdown
configuration.styles.description: JSON style map for markdown elements (heading, heading1, heading2, heading3, heading4, heading5, heading6, blockquote, list, bold, italic, strikethrough, link, inlineCode, codeFence). Default map is empty. You can apply light/dark presets in the config page (One Dark/Light Colorful, GitHub Dark/Light Cool, Ayu Dark/Light Pastel). Supported fields include background/color/decoration/fontweight/fontstyle, border fields, outline fields, gutterIconPath/gutterIconSize (absolute path required), and nested before/after attachment options.
